title: Youtube Shorts Pack
description: All you need to start with shorts!
body:
📦 YouTube Shorts Pack

YouTube Shorts Pack is a lightweight, optimized modpack built specifically for content creators who make short-form videos like YouTube Shorts, TikToks, Reels, and quick Minecraft cinematics.

Designed for Minecraft 1.20.4 (Fabric), this pack focuses on performance, fast building, visual quality, and efficient recording workflows, without unnecessary or heavy mods.

🎥 Made for Short-Form Content

Perfect for:

YouTube Shorts

TikTok & Instagram Reels

Fast-paced gameplay clips

Cinematics & replays

Timelapses and builds

🧱 Fast & Efficient Building

Speed up your creative process with:

Building Wands – quick block placement and filling

Litematica – schematics and build planning

Litematica Printer – automatic schematic building

🎬 Cinematic & Visual Quality

Enhance visuals while keeping performance stable:

Iris Shaders

Complementary Reimagined Shaders

Euphoria Patches (shader enhancements & fixes)

🛋️ Creative & World Variety

Macaw’s Furniture – modern and decorative building options

Repurposed Structures – improved and extended vanilla structures

🧩 Core & Utilities

Includes essential Fabric libraries for stability and compatibility:

Fabric API

Architectury API

Cloth Config

MaLiLib

MidnightLib

Fabric Language Kotlin

🚀 Performance First

Lightweight and clean mod list

Optimized assets and configs

Fast loading times

Low memory usage
